original: This huge, muscular creature has a slavering maw full of razor-sharp fangs, and walks on four legs in an almost gorilla-like gait. The hound’s claws dig into the earth, clattering across the stone and echoing through the cavern. Glowing blue eyes look you over with a bestial, hungry intelligence.

original: The wetra hound bellows, a thunderous roar that echoes through the caverns, and charges at you at its full, loping speed.",null,this

original: You tumble out of the way as quick as you can, letting the hound’s momentum carry it past you. Its head slams into a wall with what should have been lethal force... but the beast just shakes it off and whirls around, ready to keep fighting!
context: <<POS:01993683>> combatAppend(" You tumble out of the way as quick as you can, letting the hound’s momentum carry it past you. Its head slams into a wall with what should have been lethal force... but the beast just shakes it off and whirls around, ready to keep fighting!")

original: The beast slams into you head-first, its thick skull-plate acting like a battering ram that sends you flying against the cavern wall. You yelp in pain as the rib-cracking attack lands, and leaves you rolling in agony on the floor.
